description: Frozen reference for the tiny numerical-smoke oracle (tol-regression-tiny; plan §6.3, decision 0005).

policy.same_platform: On a platform matching capture_platform exactly (os_system, machine, python_version, torch_version), the run MUST reproduce `fingerprint` bit-for-bit; `value` matches exactly.
policy.cross_platform: On any other platform, only `value` is compared, within cross_platform_relative_tolerance (the documented §2.4 cross-platform boundary). The fingerprint is NOT required to match.
policy.provenance_note: This oracle was captured on the maintainer's DEVELOPMENT platform (macOS arm64), NOT inside the public Linux CPU reference container. It is therefore an interim drift guard. The authoritative reference-container oracle (and a tightened, evidence-backed tolerance) is captured at Phase 13 when the reference environment is fixed; capture_platform_is_reference_container flips to true then.
policy.tolerance_basis: 1e-3 relative is an interim guard, not a measured bound: it comfortably exceeds observed same-platform drift (0) while tolerating BLAS/arch differences across CPUs until the reference platform is fixed. It will be replaced by a measured cross-environment bound at the Phase 13 freeze (tol-ch3-xenv / tol-ch4-xenv style).
